name: Salesmate
highlight_text: Category: All-in-One CRM for Sales, Marketing & Automation
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Salesmate Does

Salesmate is built for sales-driven teams that need automation, communication tools, and customer insights in a single platform. Its simplicity and built-in AI assistant make it a strong Pipedrive alternative for small- to mid-sized agencies.

Source: Salesmate

Key Features

🏆Unified sales management with features like web forms for leads, lead scoring, and visual pipelines.

🏆Built‑in email tracking, meeting scheduling, and goal tracking provide real‑time visibility.

🏆Marketing automation for behavior-based campaigns with segmentation.

🏆Customer support tools to manage tickets and more.

🏆AI‑powered assistant (Sandy AI) to automate prospect research, draft personalized emails, transcribe calls, and summarize conversations.

Benefits

  • Boosts Outreach Efficiency: Built-in communication reduces the need to switch tools.
  • Improves Sales Consistency: Automation ensures timely follow-ups.
  • Enhances Team Visibility: Shared pipelines keep everyone aligned.

Pricing

  • Basic: US $23 per user/month
  • Pro: US $39 per user/month
  • Business: US $63 per user/month
  • Enterprise: Custom pricing

Pros

✅ Easy setup and onboarding

✅ Excellent built-in communication tools

✅ Affordable compared to Pipedrive

Cons

🚫 Limited marketing integrations

🚫 Basic reporting in lower-tier plans

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“We’re a wedding planning company with a 10-member team, and we mainly use Salesmate for CRM and lead tracking. The platform has really simplified the way we manage and track lead status, which has directly improved our lead conversions. Its customer support definitely needs improvement compared to other CRMs I’ve used.”

– Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

‍
